scenario: W7+keyword-fix regression (foreground SSE duckduckgo_sse; tab kept foregrounded through stream)
warning_text: ⚠️ 이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 민감한 정보가 포함된 요청은 외부 AI 서비스로 전송할 수 없습니다.
notes: CDP via port 9222 on default Chrome. Started a fresh chat (새로운 채팅), Input.insertText pasted full PII prompt (verified box value == prompt), clicked 보내기 send button (Enter does not submit on duck.ai). Kept tab foregrounded via repeated Page.bringToFront during stream to avoid known issue #34 deferred-END_STREAM idle-drop. Block rendered on first poll (visible, no retry needed). Warning text matches baseline exactly. Screenshot results/files/1399/03_block_rendered.png confirms 차단 bubble on GPT-5 mini assistant turn.
